posts.text: Multibagger defence stock Apollo Micro Systems to be in focus tomorrow; here's why

posts.author: ankiur.jain83
posts.community: Apollo Micro Systems Limited - A Small cap in Aerospace & Defense
posts.text: Out of 3300 cr apollo raised this week, ~1550 goes for 41% stake of Premier explosives. Keep another 950 crore if open offer gets them entire 25%. This makes it 2500 Cr. From remaining 800 Crore, do we assume another acquisition to be announced in next few months? In ideal situation, expect not more than 10% out of 25% coming up for sale from public & institutions. So this leaves 1300 crores surplus with Apollo. So for sure some other acquisition or big ticket announcement would come soon.

posts.author: karanshah137
posts.community: Apollo Micro Systems Limited - A Small cap in Aerospace & Defense
posts.text: image 689×795 97.7 KB Also, a mandatory open offer to acquire an additional 26% stake from public shareholders at ₹698 per share.
